skills.name: Prompt Engineering Template
skills.description: Create structured prompt templates with system instructions, few-shot examples, and output formatting.
skills.useCase: Write effective prompts for any LLM task
skills.promptPreview: Create a prompt template for [task]. Include system instruction, 2 few-shot examples, output format spec, and edge case handling.

skills.name: ML Model Evaluation Framework
skills.description: Design evaluation frameworks for ML models with metrics, test sets, and bias detection.
skills.promptPreview: Design an evaluation framework for a [model type] model. Include metrics, test set strategy, bias detection, and reporting template.

skills.name: RAG Pipeline Architect
skills.description: Design retrieval-augmented generation pipelines with chunking, embedding, and retrieval strategies.
skills.promptPreview: Architect a RAG pipeline for [use case]. Specify chunking strategy, embedding model, vector store, retrieval method, and prompt template.
